ShareMapModal coverage 26→59 (was 0.72 ratio): added 33 tests crossing the 3000-assertion milestone. Replicated buildShareUrl as pure function (encodeURIComponent on topicId for special-char safety, always sets shared=1 query flag, routes to /student/knowledge-map, SSR-safe empty string when no window). Clipboard copy + fallback (navigator.clipboard.writeText primary, on success linkCopied toast + setCopied(true), on failure inputRef.select() + linkCopyFallback toast, clearTimeout-then-setTimeout no stacked timers, 2500ms auto-reset, cleanup return on open effect). Web Share API (supportsShare gate combines navigator + share check, payload shape {title, text, url}, title fallback 'Mapa de Conocimiento' when no topicName, AbortError silent swallow, real errors via devWarn, !navigator.share early-return defensive). Auto-select + ARIA wiring (requestAnimationFrame post-paint select, click-input reselect, useId-derived titleId/descId, aria-labelledby + aria-describedby + role=dialog + aria-modal). Backdrop + click-outside (wrapper onClick onCloseRef, panel stopPropagation isolates inside-clicks, Escape preventDefault+stopPropagation+close, backdrop aria-hidden). Body+html scroll-lock symmetry (captures both prevHtml/prevBody, restores both NOT hardcoded 'auto', removeEventListener keydown). Responsive layout (sm:hidden mobile drag-handle, items-end vs items-center, rounded-t-2xl bottom-sheet vs rounded-2xl). Locale fallback regression (?? I18N_MAP_VIEW.es). Result: 74 files / 3019 tests, ALL PASSING — 3000 milestone crossed.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 3019/3019 assertions pass; 3000-test milestone reached; ShareMapModal share-flow + Web-Share-API + scroll-lock pinned
